content.scenarioHint: 你的朋友刚刚剪了一个新发型，你真诚地夸赞了他/她，现在他/她回应说'谢谢！我其实有点担心这个发型'。你需要自然地回应，给予更多鼓励或安慰。
expectedAnswers: You look amazing! I think it really suits you.
Don't worry—I love it! It gives you such a fresh look.
Seriously, it’s a huge improvement! You’ve always had great style.
I was worried for you at first, but now I can’t imagine you with anything else!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否有效缓解了对方的担忧并强化了正面反馈
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态和用词恰当
表达自然度：符合英语母语者日常对话的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：使用了与发型、外貌、自信相关的关键词如 'suit', 'look', 'style', 'worry' 等

content.scenarioHint: 你的朋友刚剪了新发型，你想真诚地赞美并开启对话，需要主动询问对方对新发型的感受。
expectedAnswers: Wow, your new haircut looks amazing! Did you get it done at that new salon?
I love your new style—it really suits you! How was the experience getting it cut?
You look totally different in the best way! Was it hard to decide on this look?
That haircut is so fresh! Who did it for you?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了赞美并询问对方感受的意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：是否符合英语母语者日常对话的语气和节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了与发型、赞美、体验相关的关键词如 haircut, look, suit, experience

content.speakerText: I changed my hairstyle—what do you think?
content.speakerTextCn: 我换了新发型，你觉得怎么样？
expectedAnswers: I love it! It gives you such a modern, edgy look.
You look totally refreshed—this style suits you better than your old one.
Wow, that’s a bold change! But it works so well on you.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否真诚赞美并指出具体优点
语言准确性：使用恰当形容词和结构，如 'edgy look', 'suits better'
表达自然度：是否使用真实语境中的口语节奏和语气词（如 'wow', 'totally'）
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'change', 'style', 'suit', 'look' 等核心词汇
